mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_index_job ( id, material_id, canonical_document_id, staging_document_id, user_id, operation, status, request_version, idempotency_key, attempt, request_json, result_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{materialId}, #{canonicalDocumentId}, #{stagingDocumentId}, #{userId}, #{operation}, #{status}, #{requestVersion}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{attempt}, #{requestJson}, #{resultJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_index_job SET status = #{status}, result_json = #{resultJson}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, indexed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE rag_index_job SET status = #{status}, result_json = #{resultJson}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, promoted_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUCCEEDED' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE promoted_at END, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rag_index_job SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
